abilities.name: Drunk and Reckless
abilities.description: If Intoxicated, may suffer 2 damage at start of turn to gain additional General AP.

abilities.name: Drunken Gremlin Kung Fu
abilities.description: Always Intoxicated (suffers - to Willpower duels). When attacked by Close/Ranged, attacker counts + as - and - as +.

abilities.name: Numb the Pain
abilities.description: While Intoxicated, ignores effects of Weak and Moderate Critical Effects.

actions: (1) Tiny Green Fists of Fury (Martial Arts) | AV: 5 (12) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Severe inflicts Weak Critical Effect. Ram Critical Strike: +1 damage per Ram. Mask Drunken Roundhouse: After succeeding, take action again vs different character.

(1) Have a Drink (Bewitch) | AV: 4 (11) | Rg: 1 | Resist: Wp | Living target gains Intoxicated Condition 10 min or Poison +1 if already. Crow Bit Woozy: After succeeding, Slow. Ram Liver Damage: After succeeding, suffers 1/3/4 damage.
system.notes: Serve enigmatic Brewmaster. Renounce family ties, swear loyalty. Receive all alcohol. Survive initiation through Drunken Gremlin Kung Fu training. Kept drunk throughout training.
